    • Method Detail

      • build

        public javax.mail.Multipart build(java.lang.String messageText,
                                  java.lang.String messageHtml,
                                  java.util.List<java.lang.String> messageHtmlInline,
                                  java.util.List<java.lang.String> attachments)
                           throws javax.mail.MessagingException
        Build an email message. The HTML may reference the embedded image (messageHtmlInline) using the filename. Any path portion is ignored to make my life easier e.g. If you pass in the image C:\Temp\dog.jpg you can use or and both will work
        Parameters:
        messageText -
        messageHtml -
        messageHtmlInline -
        attachments -
        Returns:
        Throws:
        javax.mail.MessagingException
